prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第20名，近年排名稳定在Top20，属国内顶尖高校层次；2026年声 誉评价偏负面，涉及PPT贬低其他专业及考试管理争议，但事件规模有限；抖音热度评价为"一般"，综合热度排名第66位，无明显报考热度异常信号；第五轮学 科评估A-及以上学科达20个，其中化学工程与技术、管理科学与工程为A+，仪器科学与技术、光学工程、建筑学、土木工程等为A，工科整体实力突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
6 .【专业热度与环境】广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约1.58万人（+3.6%），竞争略有加剧。
7. 【地域因素】天津大学位于天津市，与广东省距离较远，但作为传统工科强校，在广东仍保持较高认可度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物 理类缩招约14.1%使位次前移、广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%使竞争加剧、以及近年位次持续后移趋势，缩招效应略占主导，预计2026年最低位次较2025年有所前移，预测最低位 次约8067名，区间7567–8567名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 8649 → 8188 → 7792 → 8314 → 8868, showing a backward trend in the last two years, with a shift of about 554 places from 2024 to 2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 8868; the provincial plan for Physics Category was 72 students in 2021–2022, increased to 73 in 2023–2024, and significantly increased to 85 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 73 students, a decrease of 12 students (about -14.1%) compared to 2025, indicating a clear reduction in enrollment, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 20th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the Top20 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving controversies over PPT disparaging other majors and exam management, but the scale of the incident is limited; Douyin popularity evaluation is "average", with a comprehensive popularity ranking of 66th, showing no abnormal signals in application popularity; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering as A+, and Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Architecture, and Civil Engineering as A, with overall strong engineering strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.
6. [Major Popularity and Environment] The number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 15,800 ( +3.6%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.
7. [Regional Factors] Tianjin University is located in Tianjin City, far from Guangdong Province, but as a traditional strong engineering school, it still maintains high recognition in Guangdong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the approximately 14.1% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, which shifts rankings forward, the approximately 3.6% increase in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province, which intensifies competition, and the recent trend of rankings moving backward, the reduction effect slightly dominates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift forward compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 8067, and a range of 7567–8567.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 7567–8567, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 7500), focus on Tier 1 Future Technology College and Intelligence and Computing Category; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 8500), mainly apply for Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2695, and in 2025 it was about 3157, a backward shift of about 462 places in one year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3157; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 13 in 2024, reduced to 8 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 13, an increase of 5 (about +62.5%) compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 20th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but mainly involves incidents related to science and engineering, with limited impact on History Category applications; Douyin popularity evaluation is 'average'; Architecture A, Urban and Rural Planning A, Landscape Architecture A-, highly relevant to the Architecture category (including Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture, Architecture) in History Category admissions, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, there are approximately 326,200 History Category examinees in Guangdong Province, an increase of about 34,000 (+11.6%) compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Tianjin University is located in Tianjin City, far from Guangdong Province; only two majors are offered in History Category: Architecture and Social Science Pilot Class, with a narrow selection range, which may affect some candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion of about 62.5% in History Category in 2026, which shifts the ranking backward, the increase of about 11.6% in History Category examinees in Guangdong Province, which intensifies competition, and the recent trend of ranking backward, the expansion effect and the increase in examinees combine, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will further shift backward compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 4391, in the range of 3891–4891.
